label: Quantized inference & compressed deployment

node.label: Quantized inference & compressed deployment
node.definition: Quantized inference stores and computes weights or activations in reduced precision, trading numerical fidelity for lower memory, energy, and latency.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Quantized inference & compressed deployment is to connect Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation, Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion to downstream capabilities including Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment, Image generation, editing & design.
examples: substrate for Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
substrate for Image generation, editing & design
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation, Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion.

dependencies.rationale: Quantized inference & compressed deployment turns Quantization-aware training & low-precision adaptation into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Quantized inference & compressed deployment turns Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Quantized inference & compressed deployment turns GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Quantized inference & compressed deployment turns Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Quantized inference & compressed deployment turns Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
